description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code/Codex as an AI collaborator in your vault
🎨 Powerful, minimalistic, cross-platform, opensource note-taking app
Markdown memory system for you and your AI agent

Small-code database for non-programmers. Universal UI, simple-code logic, automatic actions, access rules, logging, API and more. Quickly create a complex internal apps using the database as an interface.

NEO Emacs (WIP): A GPU-powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
Wishes in, PRs out. CLI agent that interviews you, plans the work, dispatches parallel agents in isolated worktrees, and reviews code before you see it.
The Swiss army knife of code time tracking.
A powerful command-line interface for Atlassian Confluence
Git-aware navigation for VS Code: a tree of recent changes, a branch-relative blame heatmap, branch compare, pickaxe diff search, and a resurrect-deleted-files button.
⌚ Feature rich event, group and time managment system

ERD Builder Pro is a professional-grade, high-performance web application designed for developers and database architects to build, document, and visualize complex data structures. Built with a modular architecture and modern tech stack, it offers a seamless experience for database design and technical documentation.
A keyboard-first menubar app to monitor and jump between AI coding sessions — minimum setup required.
